impact: This advances the PP&D daemon repair plan by pinning the parser-clean retry boundary: after syntax_preflight history for checkbox-178, broad source-plus-fixture-plus-test bundles are rejected while a one-file parser repair or one-file daemon repair remains allowed.
summary: Add checkbox-200 retry-scope unittest for syntax_preflight checkbox-178 scope limits.
target_task: Task checkbox-200: Add one parser-clean daemon retry-scope unittest proving a syntax_preflight history for checkbox-178 rejects a three-file source-plus-fixture-plus-test proposal and allows exactly one parser-bearing file or exactly one daemon repair file.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
